status: Fixed in planning-root status triangulation lane
area: Task status triangulation / planning mirror closeback
finding: After a successful adopter-aware planning closeback commit, `tasks status` can still report `planningFrontmatter.status: null` and classify the task as `stale-import` or `ledger-ahead-of-planning-mirror`, even though live ledger is `done` and the planning repo close commit exists. Target ledger `source.planPath` values imported from `3KLife` are often relative planning-tree paths that do not resolve from the target repo working tree.
expectedBehavior: Status triangulation should resolve the task's `source.planPath` back to the planning repo via `ATM_PLANNING_REPO_ROOT` (or an absolute stored path) after taskflow closeback and report the actual planning frontmatter status, or explain precisely why the mirror cannot be read. A successful closeback should not immediately look stale.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed by routing `resolvePlanningCardPath()` through `resolvePlanAbsoluteFromStored()`, so planning-root-relative ledger paths resolve against configured planning roots instead of the target repo root. Regression coverage: `node --strip-types packages/cli/src/commands/tasks/__tests__/status-triangulation.spec.ts` creates a temporary `ATM_PLANNING_REPO_ROOT` and proves `source.planPath: rft-hardening/tasks/TASK-RFT-0004.task.md` resolves to the external planning card.
followUp: Keep the planning-root-relative resolver regression alongside parity override tests; broader close exit behavior remains tracked by `ATM-BUG-2026-07-10-078`.
